description_long: This shotgun features a long, cylindrical barrel with a prominent front sight and a ventilated handguard. The receiver is robust and metallic, with a visible ejection port and a magazine well beneath. The stock is a full, solid piece with a slightly curved butt, made from a dark, likely synthetic or wooden material. The pistol grip is ergonomic and integrated into the stock, providing a secure hold. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement. The overall finish is matte black with metallic highlights, giving it a utilitarian and durable appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A matte black shotgun with a long barrel, full stock, and ergonomic pistol grip, featuring a rounded trigger guard and robust metallic receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the barrel, handguard, receiver, pistol grip, and full stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening, front sight, and narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same major features as view 0, with the ejection port and magazine well more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the pistol grip and trigger guard visible in profile.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no finger grooves or reinforcement
